# GitHub Copilot Instructions

**This file points to `CLAUDE.md` in the repo root. Read that file in full at the start of every session.**

[CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) is the single source of truth for all AI assistants working on this project (Claude app, VS Code Copilot, Cursor, etc.). It contains:

- The 4 load-bearing rules (Karpathy)
- About the user (Gareth — non-technical, needs plain-English step-by-step)
- Current project status
- Communication defaults
- Behavior rules (scope, confirmations, destructive-action gates)
- Content rules (YMYL, voice, banned vocabulary, sources)
- SEO rules
- Locked tech stack (Hugo + Python + GitHub Actions + Hostinger)
- Directory structure + key data files
- Session protocols ("go", "session end", error logging)
- Deploy pipeline (push to `main` → auto-deploys)
- Worker souls reference
- Permanent facts

If `CLAUDE.md` and any older instructions conflict, **`CLAUDE.md` wins.**
